readme_content: Soil environmental conditions at Brush Meadow (BM) site, East River Watershed, Colorado. Campbell CS-655 soil water content reflectometers measuring temperature and VWC at depths 25-180 cm. Data loggers: CR200x. Measurement interval: 1-6 hours. Period: June 2016 to October 2018. Associated with: Winnick et al. (2020) JGR Biogeosciences doi:10.1029/2020JG005924. Gas wells (EGM-5, PP Systems) for soil CO2 measurement co-deployed with soil moisture sensors.

time_series_inference.reasoning: Campbell CS-655 soil moisture sensors with CR200x data logger. Filename date range 0616-1018 = June 2016 to October 2018 (~28 months). Publication (Winnick et al. 2020 JGR Biogeosciences doi:10.1029/2020JG005924) documents 1-6 hour logging intervals and diel VWC oscillation patterns. Multiple observations per site/depth with varying timestamps. Interval estimated as 60 min; actual value computed from datetime diffs.

similar_dataset_reference.reason: Closest structural match in exemplar pool: single-site SFA time series VWC dataset with separate location metadata file containing lat/lon. Both use long-format data with depth information and a site prefix naming convention. (Note: dataset 8 uses wide format with depth in column names; no perfect long-format exemplar with Depth (cm) column in pool.)

open_questions: Timestamp format not confirmed from file: assuming '%m/%d/%y %H:%M' (e.g., '06/01/16 08:00'); confirm from actual file header.
Exact measurement interval not confirmed: publication says 1-6 hours; using 60 min as estimate; actual interval computed from data.
Timezone not confirmed: assuming America/Denver for East River, Colorado; typical for this SFA corpus.
VWC units: CS-655 default output is m3/m3; column name 'Volumetric Water Content' without % symbol suggests no conversion needed; confirm from README or file header.
Site_id assignment: 'Location' column in data file assumed to contain 'BM'; confirm exact string value.
File encoding: 'Latitude (o N)' column name contains degree symbol (U+00BA); latin-1 encoding may be required for BM_EGM_Well_CO2.csv.
